label: PA2_NEURAL_PROGENITOR
resolved_names: dp2 (PAX3+ neurogenic dorsal progenitor / pre-neurogenic transition)
tissue_context: spinal cord (alar plate, dorsal neural tube)
evidence: HDCA Supplementary Table 9 assigns PA2_NEURAL_PROGENITOR to broad_celltype CNS_SPINAL_PROGENITOR, systems NERVOUS_SYSTEM, CL term CL:4042021. Top gene signature (NGFR,PAX3,DCX,DCC,NHLH1,DLL3,PDPN,INSM1,ELAVL3,HOXD3,HOXB2,RCOR2,SRRM4,NEUROD4,ADGRG1,MAP6,ELAVL4,TFAP2B,GADD45G,HOXA3) matches canonical dp2 (PAX3+ neurogenic dorsal progenitor / pre-neurogenic transition) markers documented in Lu 2015, Castellani 2013, Gray de Cristoforis 2020.
